heading: (intro)
raw: It was directed by Peter Weir, and written by Andrew Niccol.
clean: It was directed by Peter Weir, and written by Andrew Niccol.

heading: Truman Burbank
raw: Good morning, and in case I don't see ya: Good afternoon, good evening, and good night!
clean: Good morning, and in case I don't see ya: Good afternoon, good evening, and good night!

heading: Truman Burbank
raw: You can't get any further away, before you start coming back.
clean: You can't get any further away, before you start coming back.

heading: Truman Burbank
raw: The early bird gathers no moss! The rolling stone catches the worm!
clean: The early bird gathers no moss! The rolling stone catches the worm!

heading: Truman Burbank
raw: Somebody help me, I'm being spontaneous!
clean: Somebody help me, I'm being spontaneous!

heading: Truman Burbank
raw: [Sailing away in the artificially roughened winds and seas] Is that the best you can do? You're gonna have to kill me! [sings] What do ya do with a drunken sailor? What do ya do with a drunken sailor? What do ya do with a drunken sailor ear-lye in the mor-nin'!
clean: Is that the best you can do? You're gonna have to kill me! What do ya do with a drunken sailor? What do ya do with a drunken sailor? What do ya do with a drunken sailor ear-lye in the mor-nin'!

heading: Truman Burbank
raw: [to Meryl who is threatening him with a kitchen utensil] What are you gonna do? Slice me, dice me or peel me? There are so many choices.
clean: What are you gonna do? Slice me, dice me or peel me? There are so many choices.

heading: Truman Burbank
raw: [after startling two control room directors by seemingly talking to them, then easing their concerns by seeming to revert back to his eccentricity, whilst they look at their notes temporarily] That one's for free.
clean: That one's for free.

heading: Truman Burbank
raw: You never had a camera in my head!
clean: You never had a camera in my head!

heading: Truman Burbank
raw: [watching himself in the mirror in the bathroom] I here by proclaim this planet as Trumania of the Burbank Galaxy!
clean: I here by proclaim this planet as Trumania of the Burbank Galaxy!

heading: Truman Burbank
raw: [After credits at end of movie] ,"I knew this show was fake from the start, it was my incredible acting that fooled everyone"
clean: ,"I knew this show was fake from the start, it was my incredible acting that fooled everyone"

heading: Christof
raw: We accept the reality of the world with which we are presented, it's as simple as that.
clean: We accept the reality of the world with which we are presented, it's as simple as that.

heading: Christof
raw: If his was more than just a vague ambition, if he [Truman] was absolutely determined to discover the truth, there's no way we could prevent him.
clean: If his was more than just a vague ambition, if he was absolutely determined to discover the truth, there's no way we could prevent him.

heading: Christof
raw: Cue the sun!
clean: Cue the sun!

heading: Christof
raw: That's our hero shot.
clean: That's our hero shot.

heading: Christof
raw: "I've given Truman the chance to lead a normal life. The world, the place you live in is the sick place. Seahaven is the way the world should be."
clean: I've given Truman the chance to lead a normal life. The world, the place you live in is the sick place. Seahaven is the way the world should be.

heading: Christof
raw: I am the creator... of a television show
clean: I am the creator... of a television show

heading: Christof
raw: [Christof looks in a monitor & sees Truman sailing on the sea] Where you going, Truman?
clean: Where you going, Truman?

heading: Marlon
raw: [Speaking as an actor on the show.] It's all true. It’s all real. Nothing here is fake. Nothing you see on this show is fake. It’s merely controlled.
clean: It's all true. It's all real. Nothing here is fake. Nothing you see on this show is fake. It's merely controlled.

heading: Marlon
raw: That's a whole lot of world for one man.
clean: That's a whole lot of world for one man.

heading: Marlon
raw: [holding a beer can close to the camera] Now that's a beer.
clean: Now that's a beer.

heading: Marlon
raw: [looking at a sunset with Truman] That's the big guy... Quite a paintbrush he's got.
clean: That's the big guy... Quite a paintbrush he's got.

heading: Marlon
raw: [on the bridge with Truman, being fed scripted lines by the show's director] And the last thing I would ever do is lie to you, Truman.
clean: And the last thing I would ever do is lie to you, Truman.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Marlon: Where the hell's Fiji? Near Florida?
clean: Where the hell's Fiji? Near Florida?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: [Pointing to golf ball] See here?
clean: See here?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Marlon: Yeah.
clean: Yeah.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: This is us...[guides finger halfway around ball]
clean: This is us...

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: and all the way around here... Fiji. You can't get any further away before you start coming back.
clean: and all the way around here... Fiji. You can't get any further away before you start coming back.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Sylvia: Look at what you've done to him!
clean: Look at what you've done to him!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Christof: I have given Truman the chance to lead a normal life. The world, the place you live in, is the sick place. Seahaven is the way the world should be.
clean: I have given Truman the chance to lead a normal life. The world, the place you live in, is the sick place. Seahaven is the way the world should be.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: It was Dad. I swear! Dressed like a homeless man. And you know what else was strange? A business man and a woman with a little dog came out of nowhere and forced him onto a bus.
clean: It was Dad. I swear! Dressed like a homeless man. And you know what else was strange? A business man and a woman with a little dog came out of nowhere and forced him onto a bus.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman's Mother: Well! It's about time they cleaned up the trash downtown before we become just like the rest of the country.
clean: Well! It's about time they cleaned up the trash downtown before we become just like the rest of the country.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Network Executive: For God's sake, Chris! The whole world is watching. We can't just let him die in front of a live audience!
clean: For God's sake, Chris! The whole world is watching. We can't just let him die in front of a live audience!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Christof: He was born in front of a live audience.
clean: He was born in front of a live audience.

heading: Dialogue

clean: Lauren, right? It's on your book.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lauren: Lauren. Right. Right.
clean: Lauren. Right. Right.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: Well, I'm Truman.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lauren: Yeah. I know. Look, Truman, I'm not allowed to talk to you. You know.
clean: Yeah. I know. Look, Truman, I'm not allowed to talk to you. You know.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: Yeah, well, I can understand, I'm a pretty dangerous character.
clean: Yeah, well, I can understand, I'm a pretty dangerous character.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: Blocked at every turn. Beautifully synchronized, don't you agree?
clean: Blocked at every turn. Beautifully synchronized, don't you agree?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Meryl: You're blaming me for the traffic?
clean: You're blaming me for the traffic?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: Should I?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Meryl: Truman, let's go home.
clean: Truman, let's go home.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: You're right. We could be stuck here for hours. It could be like this all the way to Atlantic City. Let's go back. I'm sorry. I don't know what got into me.

raw: Truman: Yes, I can.

heading: Dialogue

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: I changed my mind. What's New Orleans like this time of year? Mardi Gras, woooooo! Ha ha ha ha ha! Hoo hoo hoo! Whoooohoo! Look, Meryl! Same road, no cars. It's magic! Hahaha!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Meryl: You let me out, Truman. You're not right in the head! You want to destroy yourself, you do it on your own!
clean: You let me out, Truman. You're not right in the head! You want to destroy yourself, you do it on your own!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Truman: I think I'd like a little company.
